# Miri Consulting

> Miri Consulting helps US landscape, snow, and construction companies get more value from their software and systems — especially Aspire — by improving setup, accounting workflows, job costing, estimating, reporting, and day-to-day operations.

Miri works across four practice areas — Operations, Finance, Digital, and HR — and specializes in implementing and cleaning up industry-standard software such as Aspire, Buildertrend, and QuickBooks, then connecting it to how the business actually runs. Service area: United States. To get in touch, book an introductory call through the Calendly scheduling link on the site.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.miri-consulting.com/): Overview of Miri Consulting — services (Operations, Finance, Digital, HR), industries served, client testimonials, and the team.
- [Aspire Consulting for Landscape Companies](https://www.miri-consulting.com/aspire-consulting-for-landscape-companies): Aspire consulting for US landscape companies — Aspire setup and cleanup (item catalogs, kits, production factors, permissions, templates, dashboards and reporting), Aspire + QuickBooks month-end close and job-cost variance review, and landscape operations consulting (field-to-office workflows, estimating, job costing, KPI cadence). For companies implementing Aspire, or already live but not getting clean, trusted reporting.

## Optional

- [Full text](https://www.miri-consulting.com/llms-full.txt): Every page above with the Aspire offering expanded inline — when to engage, the three service tracks, best-fit profile, and key engagement facts.
